task: Parse an AWS CloudFormation template and extract all resource logical IDs that have type 'AWS::S3::Bucket'
solution_criteria: Function should take a CloudFormation JSON/dict as input and return a list of logical IDs for S3 bucket resources. Should handle nested structures correctly.

task: Create a JSON policy document that allows a principal to perform s3:GetObject and s3:PutObject actions on all objects in an S3 bucket named 'my-data-bucket'
solution_criteria: Valid IAM policy JSON with correct Statement structure, Effect set to 'Allow', Action array containing both s3:GetObject and s3:PutObject, and Resource ARN matching all objects in the specified bucket.

task: Write a regex pattern to validate and extract AWS IAM role ARNs from a text string
solution_criteria: Pattern should match valid IAM role ARNs in format 'arn:aws:iam::ACCOUNT-ID:role/ROLE-NAME' and capture the account ID and role name components.
